data.title: Keppel Corporation Schedules Q3 2025 Business Updates
data.description:
Keppel Corporation Limited ( (SG:BN4) ) has shared an update.

Keppel Corporation Limited has announced the dates for its upcoming business updates for the third quarter and the first nine months of 2025. The updates will be released before the market opens on various dates in October for its different listed REITs and the corporation itself. This schedule is significant for stakeholders as it provides insights into the company’s performance and strategic direction, potentially impacting investment decisions and market perception.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:BN4) stock is a Buy with a S$10.80 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Keppel Corporation Limited stock, see the SG:BN4 Stock Forecast page.

More about Keppel Corporation Limited

Keppel Corporation Limited is a Singapore-based conglomerate with diverse operations across industries such as real estate, infrastructure, and asset management. The company is known for its integrated approach to providing solutions for sustainable urbanization, focusing on areas like energy, environment, and connectivity.

Average Trading Volume: 4,422,280

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: S$15.7B

data.title: China Jicheng Holdings Announces Major Shareholder Change
data.description:
China Jicheng Holdings Limited ( (HK:1027) ) has shared an announcement.

China Jicheng Holdings Limited announced that its substantial shareholder, Jicheng Investment Limited, has sold 123,140,900 shares, representing approximately 29.85% of the company’s total issued shares, to Benefit Gateway Limited for approximately HK$74.6 million. This transaction results in Benefit Gateway Limited becoming a substantial shareholder, while Jicheng Investment Limited ceases to hold that status. The company expects no adverse effects on its operations from this share sale.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1027) stock is a Hold with a HK$2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China Jicheng Holdings Limited stock, see the HK:1027 Stock Forecast page.

More about China Jicheng Holdings Limited

Average Trading Volume: 187,584

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: HK$1.21B

data.title: ICG Grants Share Options to CFO Under Sharesave Plan
data.description:
Intermediate Capital ( (GB:ICG) ) has shared an update.

Intermediate Capital Group PLC (ICG) operates in the financial services industry, focusing on providing alternative asset management and investment solutions. The company announced that its Chief Financial Officer, David Bicarregui, was granted options for ordinary shares under the ICG Sharesave Plan 2025. This move aligns with regulatory requirements and reflects the company’s ongoing efforts to incentivize its leadership, potentially impacting its market positioning and stakeholder confidence.

data.title: Enterprise Metals Addresses Late Lodgement of Director’s Interest Notice
data.description:
An update from Enterprise Metals Limited ( (AU:ENT) ) is now available.

Enterprise Metals Limited announced a late lodgement of Appendix 3Y for director Stephen Hart due to an administrative oversight. The company assured stakeholders that this was an isolated incident and that their current compliance arrangements with ASX Listing Rules are adequate, with no additional steps required for ongoing compliance.

More about Enterprise Metals Limited

Enterprise Metals Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing primarily on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is based in Western Australia and is involved in identifying and developing mineral deposits to enhance its market presence.

data.title: Lithium Energy Limited Rectifies Oversight in Director’s Interest Notice
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Lithium Energy Ltd. ( (AU:LEL) ).

Lithium Energy Limited announced a change in the director’s interest as Peter Smith’s 500,000 executive options lapsed on expiry. The company acknowledged a delay in notifying the ASX about this change due to an oversight, which has since been rectified. The company has reinforced its internal procedures to ensure compliance with ASX listing rules, emphasizing that this was an isolated incident and that their current practices are sufficient to prevent future occurrences.

More about Lithium Energy Ltd.

Lithium Energy Limited is a company operating in the energy sector, focusing on the exploration and development of lithium resources. The company is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX:LEL) and is involved in the production of lithium, a key component in battery technology, which is crucial for the growing electric vehicle market and renewable energy storage solutions.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$41.44M

Learn more about LEL stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Mare Group Enters Strategic Shareholders’ Agreement with Eles Board Member
data.description:
Mare Engineering Group SpA ( (IT:MARE) ) has shared an announcement.

Mare Group S.p.A. has entered into a five-year shareholders’ agreement with Massimiliano Bellucci, a board member of Eles Semiconductor Equipment S.p.A. and CEO of CBL Electronics S.r.l., to ensure collaboration and professionalism within the Eles group. The agreement includes prior consultation obligations regarding voting rights at Eles’ meetings and aims to maintain Bellucci’s involvement in the group’s operations, potentially impacting the company’s strategic positioning and stakeholder relations.

More about Mare Engineering Group SpA

Founded in 2001, Mare Group is an engineering company listed on Euronext Growth Milan, focusing on innovation through enabling technologies. With over 2,000 clients, a team of more than 500 people, and 25 operational and commercial offices across 5 countries, the company is a significant player in the innovation ecosystem. Mare Group has made substantial investments in R&D and completed 16 acquisitions since 2019, showcasing its ability to integrate complementary resources and technologies to expand its product portfolio and market presence.

Average Trading Volume: 42,392

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €66.08M

data.title: China Health Group Completes Successful Rights Issue
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from China Health Group ( (HK:0673) ).

China Health Group Limited announced the results of its Rights Issue, which offered three Rights Shares for every ten shares held. The Rights Issue was undersubscribed by 18.9%, but all unsubscribed shares were successfully placed with independent placees, making the issue fully subscribed. The underwriting agreement conditions were fulfilled, and the Rights Issue became unconditional, ensuring no untaken rights shares remained.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0673) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China Health Group stock, see the HK:0673 Stock Forecast page.

More about China Health Group

China Health Group Limited is a company incorporated in Bermuda, operating in Hong Kong under the name CHG HS Limited. It is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange with a focus on health-related services and products.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: HK$351.5M

data.title: Northern 3 VCT Celebrates Successful IPO of The Beauty Tech Group
data.description:
An update from Northern 3 VCT ( (GB:NTN) ) is now available.

Northern 3 VCT PLC announced the successful IPO of its largest unquoted holding, The Beauty Tech Group, on the London Stock Exchange. The IPO values the company at approximately £300 million, marking a significant increase from its previous valuation. The proceeds from the IPO will enable The Beauty Tech Group to further accelerate its growth strategy, reflecting positively on Northern 3 VCT’s investment portfolio and potentially enhancing shareholder value.

More about Northern 3 VCT

Northern 3 VCT PLC is involved in the investment sector, focusing on unquoted holdings with potential for growth. The company has investments in various industries, including the global at-home beauty devices market, which is part of the broader beauty and personal care industry.

data.title: Yancoal Completes Acquisition to Boost Stake in Moolarben Joint Venture
data.description:
Yancoal Australia ( (AU:YAL) ) has shared an update.

Yancoal Australia Ltd has completed the acquisition of an additional 3.75% interest in the Moolarben Joint Venture, increasing its economic stake to 98.75%. The transaction, valued at A$110.5 million, will be funded through cash holdings and future operating cash flows, with payments spread over five years. This acquisition is expected to enhance Yancoal’s production and revenue, consolidating its position in the coal industry.

More about Yancoal Australia

Yancoal Australia Ltd is a major player in the coal industry, primarily engaged in the production and sale of coal. The company operates in Australia and is listed on both the Hong Kong and Australian stock exchanges, focusing on low-cost, tier-1 coal assets.

For an in-depth examination of YAL stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.
